title: How to Setting Up a NOWPayments Digital Store: The Complete Creator Guide: What You Need to Know
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: USDT, BTC, ETH, SOL, and 300+ coins. Get paid in seconds, convert locally, and keep 100% of your revenue minus network fees.

content.text: If you're a digital creator in Nigeria, Ghana, or Kenya, trying to sell ebooks, courses, or software through PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, or Payhip, you're probably tired of dealing with geographic restrictions, banking limitations, or KYC requirements. Imagine being able to receive crypto payments for your digital products instantly and sell them globally without any hassle. Sound too good to be true? It's not. In this post, we'll show you how to set up a NOWPayments digital store and take your business to the next level.
Why This Method Works When Everything Else Fails

The conventional payment platforms often leave creators in restricted countries high and dry, but NOWPayments offers a unique solution. With its automated delivery pipeline, no KYC requirements, and 300+ coins supported, you can finally sell your digital products to anyone, anywhere in the world. No more worrying about delayed payouts, transaction fees, or conversion rates. Now, you can focus on creating and selling your products, while NOWPayments handles the payments.
What You Need Before You Start

Before you begin, make sure you have a digital product to sell, a NOWPayments account, and a wallet to receive payments. You'll also need to choose the Full Stack Bundle, our complete store infrastructure, which includes the Core Engine, Wallet Connect, and Admin Dashboard. This bundle will give you everything you need to set up a professional digital store and start selling your products instantly.
Setting Up Your Payment and Delivery Pipeline

The settlement speed difference between crypto and conventional platforms is not incremental — it is categorical. USDT on Tron settles in under 60 seconds. Bitcoin Lightning settles in seconds with negligible fees. On-chain Bitcoin settles in 10-60 minutes depending on network congestion. Compare this to PayPal's 3-5 business day bank transfer, Gumroad's weekly or monthly payout cycles, or wire transfers that take 3-7 days and cost $20-50 in bank fees each way. For a creator who needs to pay for tools, services, or simply cover expenses, the difference between instant settlement and a 30-day payout cycle is not just inconvenient — it is a cash flow problem that affects what you can build.
You can finally sell your digital products to anyone, anywhere in the world with NOWPayments.
Going Live and Making Your First Sale

Once you've set up your payment and delivery pipeline, it's time to go live and make your first sale. This is the moment you've been waiting for, and with NOWPayments, you can do it without any hassle. Simply upload your digital product to your store, set the price, and start promoting it to your audience. When a customer makes a purchase, the payment will be processed instantly, and your product will be delivered automatically.
Scaling Once the System Is Running

Now that your system is up and running, it's time to scale your business and reach more customers. To do this, focus on promoting your store and products to your target audience, and continually improve your products and services to meet their needs. You can also explore new markets, collaborate with other creators, and use analytics to inform your business decisions. The possibilities are endless.
How do I receive crypto payments for my digital products?

USDT is the most practical starting point for digital product sales because it eliminates price volatility from the equation. Your buyer pays in USDT and you receive USDT — one dollar in equals one dollar received, minus Tron network fees of under one dollar per transaction. You do not need to manage exchange rate risk or time your conversions around market movements. When you are ready to convert to local currency, you use a P2P exchange — Binance P2P is available in most countries, and local exchanges exist in Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, Pakistan, and Bangladesh with good liquidity. The conversion to naira, cedis, shillings, or rupees takes 20-30 minutes on average. This is a complete, operational path from digital product sale to local currency in your hands.
The Full Stack Bundle is the complete solution for setting up a professional digital store and selling your products instantly.

Your Action Checklist

To set up a NOWPayments digital store and start selling your digital products, follow these steps: create a NOWPayments account, integrate the Wallet Connect frontend, configure the Core Engine backend, upload your digital product to your store, set the price, and start promoting it to your audience. Once you've made your first sale, focus on scaling your business by promoting your store and products, continually improving your products and services, and exploring new markets.
With NOWPayments, you can receive crypto payments for your digital products and deliver them automatically.
